---
   760	  "about.whoUses.item2": "Equipos legales, financieros y de RR.HH. que trabajan con documentos extensos y detallados.",
   761	  "about.whoUses.item3": "Operadores y fundadores que necesitan respuestas rápidas de contratos, presentaciones e informes.",
   762	  "about.whoUses.item4": "Cualquiera que quiera ayuda de IA sin perder la capacidad de verificar la fuente.",
   763	  "about.trust.title": "Confianza, privacidad y dirección del producto",
   764	  "about.trust.paragraph1": "DocTalk se basa en generación aumentada por recuperación para que las respuestas se mantengan fundamentadas en el documento subido. El producto admite resaltado de citas, múltiples modos de rendimiento y flujos de trabajo documentales en varios formatos. Los documentos subidos se cifran en tránsito y en reposo, y los usuarios pueden administrar o eliminar sus datos desde la aplicación.",
   765	  "about.trust.paragraph2": "El producto público actual se enfoca en páginas SEO en inglés, mientras que la interfaz de la aplicación admite 11 idiomas. Las actualizaciones del producto, comparativas y guías prácticas se publican en el blog a medida que el producto evoluciona.",
   766	  "about.howItWorks.title": "Cómo funciona el producto",
   767	  "about.howItWorks.description": "Detrás de la interfaz, DocTalk combina análisis de documentos, fragmentación, recuperación y generación con modelos de lenguaje para que las respuestas permanezcan conectadas al archivo original. Esa arquitectura es importante porque el producto no intenta reemplazar el documento fuente. Intenta acortar el camino desde la pregunta hasta la evidencia verificable dentro del documento que ya tienes.",
   768	  "about.whatWePublish.title": "Qué publicamos",
   769	  "about.whatWePublish.description": "Las páginas públicas de DocTalk se centran en educación práctica del producto: explicaciones de funciones, casos de uso, comparativas de software y artículos de blog sobre flujos de trabajo documentales con IA. El objetivo es sencillo: ayudar a los usuarios a entender dónde es fuerte el producto, dónde importan las citas y para qué flujo de trabajo es realmente adecuado la herramienta antes de registrarse.",
   770	  "about.contact.title": "Contacto",
   771	  "about.contact.description1": "Las preguntas sobre el producto, colaboraciones, privacidad o soporte se pueden enviar a",
   772	  "about.contact.description2": ". También puedes encontrar el código público en",
   773	  "about.contact.evaluationHint": "Si estás evaluando DocTalk para un flujo de trabajo real, la forma más rápida de crear contexto es comenzar con la demo pública y luego revisar las páginas de precios y funciones. Esas páginas muestran la superficie actual del producto con más precisión que los directorios genéricos de herramientas de IA.",
   774	  "contact.eyebrow": "Contacto",
   775	  "contact.headline": "Contacta con el equipo de DocTalk.",
   776	  "contact.description": "La forma más rápida de contactarnos es por correo electrónico. Utilizamos una única bandeja de entrada para soporte, privacidad y comentarios sobre el producto, para que las solicitudes no se pierdan entre canales.",
   777	  "contact.primary.title": "Contacto principal",
   778	  "contact.primary.emailLabel": "Correo electrónico:",
   779	  "contact.primary.useFor": "Usa esta dirección para soporte de cuenta, problemas de facturación, solicitudes de privacidad, consultas de colaboración, informes de errores y comentarios generales sobre el producto.",
   780	  "contact.primary.usefulMessages": "Los mensajes útiles incluyen el tipo de documento implicado, la ruta o pantalla exacta en la que estabas, marcas de tiempo, capturas de pantalla y la dirección de correo electrónico asociada a tu cuenta de DocTalk. Esto facilita mucho la reproducción y resolución del problema sin largos intercambios.",

frontend/src/i18n/locales/es.json:767:  "about.howItWorks.description": "Detrás de la interfaz, DocTalk combina análisis de documentos, fragmentación, recuperación y generación con modelos de lenguaje para que las respuestas permanezcan conectadas al archivo original. frontend/src/i18n/locales/es.json:1209:  "featuresCitations.layer3Desc": "La última capa es la experiencia de resaltado interactivo. Haz clic en cualquier cita y el visor de documentos se desplaza al pasaje fuente. Para los PDF, utiliza coordenadas de cuadro delimitador para resaltar la región exacta del texto en la página. Para DOCX, PPTX y otros formatos basados en texto, utiliza la coincidencia progresiva de fragmentos de texto para localizar y resaltar el pasaje.",
frontend/src/i18n/locales/es.json:1221:  "featuresCitations.compTextSnippet": "Coincidencia de fragmentos de texto (DOCX/PPTX)",
frontend/src/i18n/locales/es.json:1239:  "featuresCitations.faq2A": "Sí. Cada cita numerada en una respuesta de IA es cliqueable. Al hacer clic, desplaza el visor de documentos al pasaje fuente exacto y lo resalta en amarillo para que pueda leer el texto original en contexto. Para archivos PDF, esto resalta la región del cuadro delimitador en la página. Para otros formatos, utiliza coincidencia de fragmentos de texto.",
frontend/src/i18n/locales/es.json:1241:  "featuresCitations.faq3A": "Sí. El resaltado de citas funciona en los 7 formatos compatibles: PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, TXT, Markdown y URLs. La navegación de citas se adapta a cada formato: PDF utiliza coordenadas del cuadro delimitador, mientras que los formatos basados en texto utilizan coincidencia progresiva de fragmentos de texto.",
frontend/src/i18n/locales/es.json:1814:  "compareHumata.citationsDocTalk": "DocTalk proporciona resaltado de citas en tiempo real. Cada cita en una respuesta de IA es cliqueable: haz clic en ella y el visor de documentos se desplaza al pasaje exacto con una superposición de resalte visual. Para documentos PDF, esto utiliza coordenadas de cuadro delimitador para un resaltado a nivel de píxel. Para otros formatos, utiliza coincidencia de fragmentos de texto. Esta verificación instantánea elimina la necesidad de buscar manualmente las fuentes, ahorrando un tiempo significativo para investigadores y profesionales. Más información sobre",
frontend/src/i18n/locales/pt.json:9:  "about.howItWorks.description": "Por trás da interface, o DocTalk combina análise de documentos, fragmentação, recuperação e geração por modelo de linguagem para que as respostas permaneçam conectadas ao arquivo original. Essa arquitetura importa porque o produto não tenta substituir o documento fonte. Ele tenta encurtar o caminho da pergunta até a evidência verificável dentro do documento que você já possui.",
frontend/src/i18n/locales/pt.json:1576:  "landing.faq.a6": "Sim. O DocTalk lida com documentos de até 500 páginas com fragmentação inteligente e busca semântica, garantindo respostas precisas mesmo em documentos muito longos.",

exec
/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import asyncio, uuid
from types import SimpleNamespace
from unittest.mock import AsyncMock, patch
import app.services.chat_service as m
from app.models.tables import ChatSession, Document, Message
from app.services.query_router import QueryIntent

class _ScalarOneResult:
    def __init__(self,v): self.v=v
    def scalar_one_or_none(self): return self.v
class _MessagesResult:
    def __init__(self,msgs): self.msgs=msgs
    def scalars(self): return SimpleNamespace(all=lambda:self.msgs)

def make_db(session_obj, doc_obj):
    async def fake_get(model,_id):
        if model is Document: return doc_obj
        if model is ChatSession: return session_obj
        if model is Message: return None
        return None
    return SimpleNamespace(
        execute=AsyncMock(side_effect=[_ScalarOneResult(session_obj), _MessagesResult([SimpleNamespace(role='user', content='q')])]),
        get=AsyncMock(side_effect=fake_get),
        add=lambda obj: None,
        commit=AsyncMock(),
        rollback=AsyncMock(),
    )

async def main():
    session_id, document_id, user_id, ledger_id = (uuid.uuid4() for _ in range(4))
    session_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=session_id, document_id=document_id, collection_id=None, title=None, domain_mode=None)
    doc_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=document_id, demo_slug=None, custom_instructions=None, page_count=200)
    db=make_db(session_obj, doc_obj)
    refund = AsyncMock()
    rec = AsyncMock()
    with patch.object(m.action_planner, 'plan', AsyncMock(return_value=SimpleNamespace(uses_rag_answer_path=True))),\\
         patch.object(m.query_router, 'route', lambda *a, **k: SimpleNamespace(primary_intent=QueryIntent.LOCAL_QA)),\\
         patch.object(m.credit_service, 'get_estimated_cost', lambda _m: 15),\\
         patch.object(m.credit_service, 'debit_credits', AsyncMock(return_value=ledger_id)),\\
         patch.object(m.corrective_retrieval_service, 'retrieve_single', AsyncMock(side_effect=asyncio.CancelledError())),\\
         patch.object(m, '_refund_predebit', refund),\\
         patch.object(m.credit_service, 'reconcile_credits', rec):
        agen = m.chat_service.chat_stream(session_id=session_id, user_message='q', db=db, user=SimpleNamespace(id=user_id, plan='pro'), mode='quick').__aiter__()
        try:

import asyncio, uuid
from types import SimpleNamespace
from unittest.mock import AsyncMock, patch
import app.services.chat_service as m
from app.models.tables import ChatSession, Document, Message

class _ScalarOneResult:
    def __init__(self,v): self.v=v
    def scalar_one_or_none(self): return self.v

class _MessagesResult:
    def __init__(self, msgs): self.msgs=msgs
    def scalars(self): return SimpleNamespace(all=lambda:self.msgs)


def make_db(session_obj, doc_obj, assistant_msg):
    async def fake_get(model,_id):
        if model is ChatSession: return session_obj
        if model is Document: return doc_obj
        if model is Message: return assistant_msg
        return None
    return SimpleNamespace(
        execute=AsyncMock(side_effect=[_ScalarOneResult(session_obj), asyncio.CancelledError()]),
        get=AsyncMock(side_effect=fake_get),
        add=lambda obj: None,
        commit=AsyncMock(),
        rollback=AsyncMock(),
    )

async def main():
    session_id, document_id, user_id, ledger_id, msg_id = (uuid.uuid4() for _ in range(5))
    session_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=session_id, document_id=document_id, collection_id=None)
    doc_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=document_id, demo_slug=None, custom_instructions=None)
    asst = SimpleNamespace(id=msg_id, role='assistant', session_id=session_id, citations=[], content='x', continuation_count=0, output_tokens=1)

    refund = AsyncMock(); rec = AsyncMock()

        try:
            await agen.__anext__()
        except BaseException as e:
            print(type(e).__name__)
    print('refund', refund.await_count, 'reconcile', rec.await_count)

/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import asyncio, uuid
from types import SimpleNamespace
from unittest.mock import AsyncMock, patch
import app.services.chat_service as m
from app.models.tables import ChatSession, Document, Message
from app.services.query_router import QueryIntent

class _ScalarOneResult:
    def __init__(self,v): self.v=v
    def scalar_one_or_none(self): return self.v
class _MessagesResult:
    def __init__(self,msgs): self.msgs=msgs
    def scalars(self): return SimpleNamespace(all=lambda:self.msgs)

class _FakeChoice:
    def __init__(self, content=None, finish_reason=None):
        self.delta = SimpleNamespace(content=content)
        self.finish_reason = finish_reason
class _FakeChunk:
    def __init__(self, content=None, *, finish_reason=None, usage=None):
        self.choices=[_FakeChoice(content=content, finish_reason=finish_reason)]
        self.usage=usage
class _ErrStream:
    def __aiter__(self):
        return self._it()
    async def _it(self):
        yield _FakeChunk('partial answer ')
        raise RuntimeError('stream broken')

class _FakePersistSession:
    def __init__(self,store): self.store=store
    async def __aenter__(self): return self
    async def __aexit__(self,*exc): return False
    def add(self,obj): self.store.append(obj)
    async def get(self,*a,**k): return None
    async def commit(self): return None
    async def rollback(self): return None


def make_db(session_obj, doc_obj):
    async def fake_get(model,_id):
        if model is Document: return doc_obj
        if model is ChatSession: return session_obj
        if model is Message: return None
        return None
    added=[]
    def add(obj):
        if isinstance(obj, Message) and getattr(obj,'id',None) is None:
            obj.id=uuid.uuid4(); obj.continuation_count=0
        added.append(obj)
    return SimpleNamespace(
        execute=AsyncMock(side_effect=[_ScalarOneResult(session_obj), _MessagesResult([SimpleNamespace(role='user', content='q')])]),
        get=AsyncMock(side_effect=fake_get),
        add=add, added=added,
        commit=AsyncMock(), rollback=AsyncMock(),
    )

async def main():
    session_id, document_id, user_id, ledger_id = (uuid.uuid4() for _ in range(4))
    session_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=session_id, document_id=document_id, collection_id=None, title=None, domain_mode=None)
    doc_obj = SimpleNamespace(id=document_id, demo_slug=None, custom_instructions=None, page_count=100)
    db=make_db(session_obj, doc_obj)
    refund, reconcile = AsyncMock(), AsyncMock()
    persist_store=[]
    fake_retrieval = SimpleNamespace(
        retrieved=[{\"chunk_id\": uuid.uuid4(), \"document_id\": document_id, \"text\": \"x\", \"page\":1, \"page_end\":1, \"bboxes\":[], \"section_title\":\"\", \"score\":0.9}],
        strategy='semantic_top_k', evaluation=None, plan=None,
    )
    fake_client = SimpleNamespace(chat=SimpleNamespace(completions=SimpleNamespace(create=AsyncMock(return_value=_ErrStream()))))
    with patch.object(m.action_planner,'plan',AsyncMock(return_value=SimpleNamespace(uses_rag_answer_path=True))),\\
         patch.object(m.query_router,'route',lambda *a,**k: SimpleNamespace(primary_intent=QueryIntent.LOCAL_QA)),\\
         patch.object(m.credit_service,'get_estimated_cost',lambda _m: 10),\\
         patch.object(m.credit_service,'debit_credits',AsyncMock(return_value=ledger_id)),\\
         patch.object(m.corrective_retrieval_service,'retrieve_single',AsyncMock(return_value=fake_retrieval)),\\
         patch.object(m,'_get_llm_client',lambda _m: fake_client),\\
         patch.object(m,'_refund_predebit',refund),\\
         patch.object(m.credit_service,'reconcile_credits',reconcile),\\
         patch.object(m,'AsyncSessionLocal',lambda: _FakePersistSession(persist_store)):
        events=[]
        async for ev in m.chat_service.chat_stream(session_id=session_id,user_message='q',db=db,user=SimpleNamespace(id=user_id,plan='pro'),mode='quick'):
            events.append(ev['event'])
        print('events',events)
    print('refund',refund.await_count,'reconcile',reconcile.await_count,'persisted_cancel',sum(1 for x in persist_store if getattr(x,'role',None)=='assistant'))

asyncio.run(main())

import asyncio, uuid
from types import SimpleNamespace
from unittest.mock import AsyncMock, patch
import app.services.chat_service as m
from app.models.tables import ChatSession, Document, Message
from app.services.query_router import QueryIntent

class _ScalarOneResult:
    def __init__(self,v): self.v=v
    def scalar_one_or_none(self): return self.v
class _MessagesResult:
    def __init__(self,msgs): self.msgs=msgs
    def scalars(self): return SimpleNamespace(all=lambda:self.msgs)
class _FakeChoice:
    def __init__(self, content=None, finish_reason=None):
        self.delta = SimpleNamespace(content=content)
        self.finish_reason = finish_reason
class _FakeChunk:
    def __init__(self, content=None, *, finish_reason=None, usage=None):
        self.choices=[_FakeChoice(content=content, finish_reason=finish_reason)]
        self.usage=usage
class _Usage: prompt_tokens=100; completion_tokens=50
class _OkStream:
    def __aiter__(self): return self._it()
    async def _it(self):
        yield _FakeChunk('ok ')
        yield _FakeChunk(None, finish_reason='stop', usage=_Usage())

def make_db(session_obj, doc_obj):
    async def fake_get(model,_id):
        if model is Document: return doc_obj
        if model is ChatSession: return session_obj
        if model is Message: return None
        return None
    added=[]
    def add(obj):
        if isinstance(obj, Message) and getattr(obj,'id',None) is None:
            obj.id=uuid.uuid4(); obj.continuation_count=0
        added.append(obj)
    return SimpleNamespace(
        execute=AsyncMock(side_effect=[_ScalarOneResult(session_obj), _MessagesResult([SimpleNamespace(role='user', content='q')])]),
        get=AsyncMock(side_effect=fake_get),
        add=add, added=added,
        commit=AsyncMock(), rollback=AsyncMock(),
    )

async def main():
    sid,did,uid,lid=(uuid.uuid4() for _ in range(4))
    session_obj=SimpleNamespace(id=sid,document_id=did,collection_id=None,title=None,domain_mode=None)
    doc_obj=SimpleNamespace(id=did,demo_slug=None,custom_instructions=None,page_count=10)
    db=make_db(session_obj,doc_obj)
    fake_retrieval=SimpleNamespace(retrieved=[{\"chunk_id\":uuid.uuid4(),\"document_id\":did,\"text\":\"x\",\"page\":1,\"page_end\":1,\"bboxes\":[],\"section_title\":\"\",\"score\":0.9}],strategy='semantic_top_k',evaluation=None,plan=None)
    fake_client=SimpleNamespace(chat=SimpleNamespace(completions=SimpleNamespace(create=AsyncMock(return_value=_OkStream()))))
    rec=AsyncMock(side_effect=RuntimeError('acct fail'))
    refund=AsyncMock()
    with patch.object(m.action_planner,'plan',AsyncMock(return_value=SimpleNamespace(uses_rag_answer_path=True))),\\
         patch.object(m.query_router,'route',lambda *a,**k: SimpleNamespace(primary_intent=QueryIntent.LOCAL_QA)),\\
         patch.object(m.credit_service,'get_estimated_cost',lambda _m: 10),\\
         patch.object(m.credit_service,'debit_credits',AsyncMock(return_value=lid)),\\
         patch.object(m.corrective_retrieval_service,'retrieve_single',AsyncMock(return_value=fake_retrieval)),\\
         patch.object(m,'_get_llm_client',lambda _m: fake_client),\\
         patch.object(m.credit_service,'calculate_cost',lambda *a,**k: 4),\\
         patch.object(m.credit_service,'reconcile_credits',rec),\\
         patch.object(m.credit_service,'record_usage',AsyncMock()),\\
         patch.object(m,'_refund_predebit',refund):
        events=[]
        async for ev in m.chat_service.chat_stream(session_id=sid,user_message='q',db=db,user=SimpleNamespace(id=uid,plan='pro'),mode='quick'):
            events.append(ev['event'])
        print('events',events)
    print('reconcile_calls',rec.await_count,'refund_calls',refund.await_count)

asyncio.run(main())

codex
**Must-fix**
1. 取消只包住了“流式阶段”，没包住“预流阶段”，预扣积分仍可泄漏。  
证据: 预扣在 [chat_service.py:1023](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1023)、[chat_service.py:1720](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1720)；对应 setup 只 `except Exception` 在 [chat_service.py:1052](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1052)、[chat_service.py:1743](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1743)；`finally` 兜底从 [chat_service.py:1584](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1584)、[chat_service.py:2141](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:2141) 才开始。  
可证伪复现: 我本地 monkeypatch 让 `retrieve_single`/setup `db.execute` 抛 `CancelledError`，结果 `refund=0, reconcile=0`。  
建议: 从“predebit 之后”到函数返回整体包 `try/except CancelledError/finally`，不要只包 stream 内层。

2. 存在“已持久化部分答案但全额退款”的计费漏洞。  
证据: LLM 异常先退款并 `settled=True` 在 [chat_service.py:1424](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1424)、[chat_service.py:1990](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1990)；PERSIST_FAILED 也同样在 [chat_service.py:1453](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1453)、[chat_service.py:2015](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:2015)。但 finally 仍会补落库部分答案在 [chat_service.py:1587](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1587)、[chat_service.py:2144](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:2144)，且因 `not settled` 门禁 [chat_service.py:1610](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1610)、[chat_service.py:2166](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:2166) 不再 reconcile。  
可证伪复现: 我造了“先出 token 再抛 LLM 异常”的流，得到 `refund=1, reconcile=0, cancel-path persisted assistant=1`。  
建议: 这些 early-return 路径不要提前 `settled=True`；统一在 finally 按 `has_answer` 决定 reconcile/refund。

3. `ACCOUNTING_ERROR` 路径会 `done` 出去，但预扣可能悬挂。  
证据: 结算异常仅发 warn 在 [chat_service.py:1566](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1566)、[chat_service.py:2124](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:2124)；随后直接 `done_emitted=True` 在 [chat_service.py:1572](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1572)、[chat_service.py:2129](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:2129)，finally 被 `if not done_emitted` 跳过 [chat_service.py:1584](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1584)、[chat_service.py:2141](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:2141)。  
建议: accounting 异常后必须同步做一次 fallback settle（reconcile/retry/refund）再发 done，或将会话标记为未结算并异步补偿。

**Should-fix**
1. `persisted` 标志与 `commit` 非原子，取消竞态可导致重复落库/重复续写。  
证据: `commit` 后才置位 `persisted=True` 在 [chat_service.py:1450](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1450)、[chat_service.py:2012](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:2012)；finally 在 `not persisted` 时再写一次 [chat_service.py:1587](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1587)、[chat_service.py:2144](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:2144)。  
建议: 引入占位行/幂等键（session+turn_id）或在 cancel-path 用 `INSERT ... ON CONFLICT`/版本号更新。

2. PAGE_LOOKUP 过早短路，吞掉 table/comparison 优先意图。  
证据: 只要识别到 page_ref 就立即 return [query_router.py:213](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/query_router.py:213)，后面的 table/comparison 判定在 [query_router.py:242](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/query_router.py:242)、[query_router.py:248](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/query_router.py:248) 根本不执行。  
实测: `"show table on page 8"` 被路由成 `PAGE_LOOKUP`。  
建议: 保留 PAGE_LOOKUP 作为强信号，但把 TABLE_QUERY/COMPARISON 作为并行 intent，而不是直接 return。

3. PAGE_LOOKUP 执行层只查 `chunks`，没并入 `document_tables`。  
证据: `_fetch_page_chunks` 仅查 `Chunk` [chat_service.py:662](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:662)。  
建议: 按页并查 `DocumentTable`，至少在 table marker 命中时 merge 进上下文。

4. RRF 在大量 plain-QA 下可能退化为 dense-only。  
证据: lexical 只在 `should_correct or table` 才跑 [corrective_retrieval_service.py:266](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/corrective_retrieval_service.py:266)；RRF 虽执行 [corrective_retrieval_service.py:289](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/corrective_retrieval_service.py:289)，但常无 lexical 信号。  
建议: plain-QA 至少低成本跑一轮 lexical（小 top_k）再融合。

**Nit**
1. C1 在 chat 核心路径已清理，但其它面向用户/模型文本仍有 “fragment(s)” 残留。  
证据示例: [rag_evaluator_service.py:191](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/rag_evaluator_service.py:191), [summary_service.py:35](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/summary_service.py:35), [document_diff_service.py:132](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/document_diff_service.py:132), [extraction_service.py:271](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/extraction_service.py:271), [es.json:384](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/frontend/src/i18n/locales/es.json:384)。  
建议: 若 C1 定义是“全产品去术语”，需补一轮全局文案清理；若仅 chat 主路径，可记为后续统一术语任务。

已执行回归命令：`SKIP_INTEGRATION=1 python3 -m pytest -q`，结果 `371 passed, 7 skipped`（与您给出的口径一致）。

可否合并 `stable`：**不可合并**（至少先修 Must-fix 1/2/3）。

**Must-fix**
1. 取消只包住了“流式阶段”，没包住“预流阶段”，预扣积分仍可泄漏。  
证据: 预扣在 [chat_service.py:1023](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1023)、[chat_service.py:1720](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1720)；对应 setup 只 `except Exception` 在 [chat_service.py:1052](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1052)、[chat_service.py:1743](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1743)；`finally` 兜底从 [chat_service.py:1584](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1584)、[chat_service.py:2141](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:2141) 才开始。  
可证伪复现: 我本地 monkeypatch 让 `retrieve_single`/setup `db.execute` 抛 `CancelledError`，结果 `refund=0, reconcile=0`。  
建议: 从“predebit 之后”到函数返回整体包 `try/except CancelledError/finally`，不要只包 stream 内层。

2. 存在“已持久化部分答案但全额退款”的计费漏洞。  
证据: LLM 异常先退款并 `settled=True` 在 [chat_service.py:1424](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1424)、[chat_service.py:1990](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1990)；PERSIST_FAILED 也同样在 [chat_service.py:1453](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1453)、[chat_service.py:2015](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:2015)。但 finally 仍会补落库部分答案在 [chat_service.py:1587](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1587)、[chat_service.py:2144](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:2144)，且因 `not settled` 门禁 [chat_service.py:1610](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1610)、[chat_service.py:2166](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:2166) 不再 reconcile。  
可证伪复现: 我造了“先出 token 再抛 LLM 异常”的流，得到 `refund=1, reconcile=0, cancel-path persisted assistant=1`。  
建议: 这些 early-return 路径不要提前 `settled=True`；统一在 finally 按 `has_answer` 决定 reconcile/refund。

3. `ACCOUNTING_ERROR` 路径会 `done` 出去，但预扣可能悬挂。  
证据: 结算异常仅发 warn 在 [chat_service.py:1566](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1566)、[chat_service.py:2124](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:2124)；随后直接 `done_emitted=True` 在 [chat_service.py:1572](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1572)、[chat_service.py:2129](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:2129)，finally 被 `if not done_emitted` 跳过 [chat_service.py:1584](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1584)、[chat_service.py:2141](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:2141)。  
建议: accounting 异常后必须同步做一次 fallback settle（reconcile/retry/refund）再发 done，或将会话标记为未结算并异步补偿。

**Should-fix**
1. `persisted` 标志与 `commit` 非原子，取消竞态可导致重复落库/重复续写。  
证据: `commit` 后才置位 `persisted=True` 在 [chat_service.py:1450](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1450)、[chat_service.py:2012](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:2012)；finally 在 `not persisted` 时再写一次 [chat_service.py:1587](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:1587)、[chat_service.py:2144](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:2144)。  
建议: 引入占位行/幂等键（session+turn_id）或在 cancel-path 用 `INSERT ... ON CONFLICT`/版本号更新。

2. PAGE_LOOKUP 过早短路，吞掉 table/comparison 优先意图。  
证据: 只要识别到 page_ref 就立即 return [query_router.py:213](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/query_router.py:213)，后面的 table/comparison 判定在 [query_router.py:242](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/query_router.py:242)、[query_router.py:248](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/query_router.py:248) 根本不执行。  
实测: `"show table on page 8"` 被路由成 `PAGE_LOOKUP`。  
建议: 保留 PAGE_LOOKUP 作为强信号，但把 TABLE_QUERY/COMPARISON 作为并行 intent，而不是直接 return。

3. PAGE_LOOKUP 执行层只查 `chunks`，没并入 `document_tables`。  
证据: `_fetch_page_chunks` 仅查 `Chunk` [chat_service.py:662](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/chat_service.py:662)。  
建议: 按页并查 `DocumentTable`，至少在 table marker 命中时 merge 进上下文。

4. RRF 在大量 plain-QA 下可能退化为 dense-only。  
证据: lexical 只在 `should_correct or table` 才跑 [corrective_retrieval_service.py:266](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/corrective_retrieval_service.py:266)；RRF 虽执行 [corrective_retrieval_service.py:289](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/corrective_retrieval_service.py:289)，但常无 lexical 信号。  
建议: plain-QA 至少低成本跑一轮 lexical（小 top_k）再融合。

**Nit**
1. C1 在 chat 核心路径已清理，但其它面向用户/模型文本仍有 “fragment(s)” 残留。  
证据示例: [rag_evaluator_service.py:191](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/rag_evaluator_service.py:191), [summary_service.py:35](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/summary_service.py:35), [document_diff_service.py:132](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/document_diff_service.py:132), [extraction_service.py:271](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/backend/app/services/extraction_service.py:271), [es.json:384](/Users/mayijie/Projects/Code/010_DocTalk/frontend/src/i18n/locales/es.json:384)。  
建议: 若 C1 定义是“全产品去术语”，需补一轮全局文案清理；若仅 chat 主路径，可记为后续统一术语任务。

已执行回归命令：`SKIP_INTEGRATION=1 python3 -m pytest -q`，结果 `371 passed, 7 skipped`（与您给出的口径一致）。

可否合并 `stable`：**不可合并**（至少先修 Must-fix 1/2/3）。
